action_set_definitions.name: get_claim_summary
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the basic summary of a claim, including policy ID, claimant name, and current status.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim (e.g., CLM-CAT-9021).

action_set_definitions.name: get_incident_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves specific data regarding the reported incident, including catastrophe codes, property descriptions, and reported damage estimates.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_policy_provisions
action_set_definitions.description: Gets specific coverage limits, deductibles, and Additional Living Expense (ALE) provisions for a policy.

policy_id.description: The policy ID linked to the claimant.

action_set_definitions.name: check_document_registry
action_set_definitions.description: Lists all documents currently associated with the claim registry.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_document_content
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the text or data contents of a specific document in the registry (e.g., reading details from an Adjuster Report).

doc_id.description: The unique identifier for the document.

example_output.content_summary: Adjuster confirms roof destruction. Estimated repair: $45,000. Displacement confirmed.

action_set_definitions.name: upload_claim_document
action_set_definitions.description: Adds necessary documentation to the claim registry (e.g., submitting an adjuster's final assessment or ALE receipts).

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

document_type.description: The type of document being uploaded.

data_payload.description: The structured data or content of the document.

action_set_definitions.name: set_internal_reserves
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the financial log to set aside funds for indemnity and ALE based on calculations.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: update_claim_status
action_set_definitions.description: Advances the claim through lifecycle stages (e.g., TRIAGED, APPROVED, PAID).

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

action_set_definitions.name: execute_disbursement
action_set_definitions.description: Triggers the final financial payout to the claimant.

claim_id.description: The unique identifier for the claim.

payout_amount.description: The total amount to be paid.

auth_code.description: Authorization code for the catastrophe event (e.g., PCS-24).

state_description.claim_id: Unique identifier for the insurance claim.
state_description.policy_details: Details of the policyholder's contract, including coverage types and limits.
state_description.claimant_info: Personal details of the individual filing the claim.
state_description.status: The current lifecycle stage of the claim (e.g., SUBMITTED, UNDER_REVIEW, PENDING_INFO, APPROVED, REJECTED, PAID).
state_description.document_registry: A list of documents received and verified by the system.
state_description.internal_financial_log: Internal tracking of reserves and pending payments.

incident_data.description: PCS-24 Hurricane Helios: Catastrophic wind damage and total roof failure reported for a 3,200 sq ft primary residence located in the storm buffer zone. Claimant reports house is currently uninhabitable due to structural exposure.
